title: Village Farms International Reports Fourth Quarter and Year End 2021 Financial Results
text: Village Farms Q4 2021 consolidated EPS of $0.03 per share, net income of $2.1 million and consolidated adjusted EBITDA of $5.3 million. Full year 2021 sales were $268.0 million, up 58% from prior year. Full year net loss was $9.1 million with adjusted EBITDA of $14.0 million, up 89%. Total cannabis sales increased 168% year-over-year to $34.4 million in Q4, representing 47% of total sales. Canadian Cannabis achieved 42% gross margin, above the company's stated target range and marked the 13th consecutive quarter of positive adjusted EBITDA. Pure Sunfarms maintained top market position for dried flower in Ontario, Alberta and British Columbia. U.S. Cannabis adjusted EBITDA was $1.9 million with 71% gross margin and launched new product line called the Synergy Collection. Village Farms Fresh showed recovery with 11% year-over-year increase in sales and positive adjusted EBITDA of $1.1 million in Q4.
